cut.name: Hard Cut
cut.description: Instant switch. Default for most scene changes.

fade.name: Fade
fade.description: Fade to/from black. Use for opening and closing only.
fade.usage: Opening scene (fade in), closing scene (fade out). Never mid-demo.

crossfade.name: Crossfade
crossfade.description: Brief dissolve between two related scenes.
crossfade.usage: Between closely related scenes only. Max 2 per demo.
